title: Spalding Energy Expansion Generating Station: Section 36 Consent Variation, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Spalding Energy Expansion Limited to vary a Section 36 consent granted on 11 November 2010 in respect of the Spalding Combined cycle gas turbine Power Station in Spalding, Lincolnshire.  Company / location   Spalding Energy ExpansionSpalding Power StationWest Marsh RoadSpalding   Type of project  Combined cycle gas turbine Power Station / Variation of a Section 36 consent, Electricity Act 1989. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
